modal.title: Session Expired
modal.message: Your session has expired. Please log in again.

sessionAlert.title: Security Validation Required
sessionAlert.message: To continue with full system access, validate your security code or password. This validation protects your information and lasts 1 hour.
sessionAlert.infor2: Without validation, you will have limited access to system tools.
sessionAlert.infor8: You can validate your code or password at any time through your profile.

infos.code: Enter the security code sent to your email or phone.
infos.password: Enter your password to validate your session.
